articles.title: Meta’s Zuckerberg calls AR ‘a research problem’ as metaverse losses jump to $4.3 billion in fourth quarter
articles.description: Meta CEO Zuckerberg has said his ambition to become a prime player in the emerging metaverse will likely cause Reality Labs to lose more than $10 billion annually for multiple years. He appears to be right.

articles.title: OpenSea's Polygon NFT Sales Top Ethereum for Second Straight Month
articles.description: The total number of Polygon NFT sales on OpenSea beat Ethereum each of the past two months—but they're mostly low-cost assets.

articles.title: Tether denies it borrowed $2B from Celsius, as described in court report
articles.description: Tether denies it borrowed $2 billion in funds from Celsius, as detailed by a court-appointed examiner in the failed crypto lender's bankruptcy proceedings.

articles.title: Dogecoin [DOGE] to rise beyond 40%? Whale activity may spur rally
articles.description: Dogecoin recently saw an increase in whale transactions. The dog-themed token has also recently seen a spike in its daily active addresses. Whale activity has increased for Dogecoin [DOGE], which is also the ninth-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, according to CoinMarketCap. Whales’ action boosted the token price and impacted some other indicators as well. Read […]

articles.title: Jim Cramer On Bitcoin’s Price Pump; ‘Market Manipulation Is At Play’
articles.description: Bitcoin’s bullish performance in the month of January 2023 has been met with a negative outlook from some of the leading figures in the cryptocurrency industry.

articles.title: Ripple v. SEC case: Legal expert outlines how Ripple win could impact XRP price

articles.title: Cardano’s Djed stablecoin locks US$10 mln in reserves on its first day
articles.description: Djed, a Cardano-based algorithmic stablecoin, has collected over US$10 million in its reserves within the first 24 hours since it was launched on Wednesday.

articles.title: BNB Chain developers introduce whitepaper for new Web3 storage network
articles.description: BNB Chain has introduced Greenfield, a new storage-based Web3 network that aims to allow users have control over their data.
